Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Abusing Customizable Selects 71 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Cuba's Fragile Power Grid Finds a Powerful New Partner 23 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port 50 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 181 upvotes, 23 comments
  5. TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster 50 upvotes, 4 comments
  6. Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain 75 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. Box of Secrets: Discreetly modding an apartment intercom with Matter 27 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. Autoresearch on an old research idea 320 upvotes, 71 comments
  9. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 137 upvotes, 26 comments
  10. A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp 70 upvotes, 13 comments
  11. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 182 upvotes, 45 comments
  12. Sunsetting the Techempower Framework Benchmarks 20 upvotes, 2 comments
  13. Windows 3.1 tiled background .bmp archive 208 upvotes, 61 comments
  14. Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun' 53 upvotes, 11 comments
  15. Claude Code Cheat Sheet 262 upvotes, 86 comments
  16. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 131 upvotes, 39 comments
  17. Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents 103 upvotes, 30 comments
  18. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 181 upvotes, 65 comments
  19. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 235 upvotes, 90 comments
  20. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 539 upvotes, 252 comments
  21. An incoherent Rust 156 upvotes, 71 comments
  22. Gerd Faltings, who proved the Mordell conjecture, wins the Abel Prize 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. Epoch confirms GPT5.4 Pro solved a frontier math open problem 198 upvotes, 94 comments
  24. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 182 upvotes, 100 comments
  25. FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers 257 upvotes, 170 comments
  26. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 153 upvotes, 97 comments
  27. US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects 381 upvotes, 293 comments
  28. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 240 upvotes, 265 comments
  29. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 387 upvotes, 592 comments
  30. The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M 76 upvotes, 102 comments

Last generated 1:30pm, 24 March 2026. Source here.
